description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Automated Test Build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a single windows-2022 job that checks out the repository with full history, installs Lua 5.4.6, downloads and runs premake to generate Visual Studio 2022 project files, installs MSBuild, builds the solution for Win32 and x64 platforms, uploads build artifacts, and creates a GitHub release with the build artifact on push events.
